myCountry.title: My Country
myCountry.prompt: Choose your team to see all their matches.
myCountry.infoIcal: Export iCal downloads an .ics file compatible with Apple Calendar, Google Calendar and Outlook.
myCountry.infoGcalIcon: The 📅 icon on each match adds it directly to your Google Calendar.

export.infoIcal: Export day downloads an .ics file you can import into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar or Outlook.
export.infoGcal: Google Cal opens the match directly in your Google Calendar from the browser.
